SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JACOB MAYER--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
